name: io.github.qmediat/gemini-code-context-mcp
description: Gemini 2M context cache for Claude Code — persistent; repeat queries ~8x faster, ~4x cheaper.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_CREDENTIALS_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Profile name in ~/.config/qmediat/credentials (chmod 0600). Created by `npx @qmediat.io/gemini-code-context-mcp init`. Recommended; keeps your API key out of ~/.claude.json.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Fallback Tier 3 auth. Your Gemini API key. Emits a warning at startup recommending you move it to the credentials profile via the init command.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_USE_VERTEX
environmentVariables.description: Set to `true` to use Vertex AI backend via Application Default Credentials. Requires GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT
environmentVariables.description: GCP project ID when using Vertex AI backend. Only read when GEMINI_USE_VERTEX=true.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_DAILY_BUDGET_USD
environmentVariables.description: Hard daily USD cap enforced locally. Server refuses calls after the cap until UTC midnight. Unlimited if unset. Honoured by `ask`, `code`, and per-iteration by `ask_agentic`.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_CODE_CONTEXT_DEFAULT_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model alias (`latest-pro`, `latest-pro-thinking`, `latest-flash`, `latest-lite`, `latest-vision`) or literal model ID. Default: `latest-pro`.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_CODE_CONTEXT_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS
environmentVariables.description: Context Cache TTL in seconds. Default: 3600 (1 hour). Hot workspaces (<10 min since last use) auto-refresh via background watcher.
